## What

Brief description of the change and the problem it solves.

## Why

Motivation — link to the issue if one exists: Closes #

## How

Key implementation decisions or anything non-obvious about the approach.

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `mypy .` pass (backend changes)
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run build` pass (frontend changes)
- [ ] Commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test or manually verified
